steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
 update_option('blogname', 'Dublin Painter');
 update_option('blogdescription', 'Professional Painting Services in Dublin');
 update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');
 flush_rewrite_rules();
 $template_map = array(
   'Home'              => 'templates/home.html',
   'Interior Painting' => 'templates/interior.html',
   'Exterior Painting' => 'templates/exterior.html',
   'Commercial Painting' => 'templates/commercial.html',
   'About Us'          => 'templates/about.html',
   'Gallery'           => 'templates/gallery.html',
   'Pricing'           => 'templates/pricing.html',
   'Contact'           => 'templates/contact.html',
   'Get a Quote'       => 'templates/blank.html'
 );
 foreach ($template_map as $title => $template) {
   $page = get_page_by_title($title);
   if (!$page) {
     $id = wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>$title,'post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','post_name'=>sanitize_title($title)));
     if (!is_wp_error($id)) {
       update_post_meta($id, '_wp_page_template', $template);
     }
   } else {
     update_post_meta($page->ID, '_wp_page_template', $template);
   }
 }
 $home = get_page_by_title('Home');
 if ($home) { update_option('show_on_front','page'); update_option('page_on_front',$home->ID); }
 echo 'Done.';
